user.title: WX Watcher
user.description: Set up WX Watcher. You can monitor one or more locations (home, work, phone, etc.), each with its own mode.

locations.title: Locations
locations.description:
Current locations: {location_list}

Add a location or finish setup.

data.action: What would you like to do?

add_static.title: Add Static Location
add_static.description: Add a fixed location that is always monitored. Zone mode includes all alerts listed for your NWS zone (broader coverage). Point mode only includes alerts whose polygon covers your exact coordinates (more precise).

add_tracked.title: Add Tracked Device
add_tracked.description: Add a device tracker to receive alerts for wherever the device is located.

error.no_zone_or_gps: Zone mode requires either GPS coordinates (for auto-resolution) or manual zone IDs
error.zone_resolve_failed: Could not resolve GPS coordinates to NWS zones
error.zone_no_gps: Selected zone does not have GPS coordinates

init.title: WX Watcher Options
init.description:

Add a location or save changes.
